title: Travel Checklist
description: A phase-by-phase checklist template for the home page widget.

items.label: Apply for Schengen visa (at least 3-4 weeks ahead)
Pack a universal power adapter and weather-appropriate clothing
Save embassy and emergency numbers to your phone
Collect a prepaid SIM card at the airport
Take the Airport Express train or STIB bus into the city
Register your address at the local commune (if staying 90+ days)
Open a Belgian bank account (if resident)
Get a MOBIB/transport card for your city
